Emdash — Building Arabic Web Products

Emdash is a UAE-based company, headquartered in Abu Dhabi, building Arabic web products. Our portfolio:

  • DahabPulse — live gold & silver prices for the GCC and Egypt (dahabpulse.com)
  • Waaei — free, validated Arabic mental-health self-assessments (waaei.me)
  • QuotesAR — Arabic & English literary quotes with verified attribution (quotesar.com)

Contact: contact@emdash.ae
